name: Jerry Jumonville
abstract: Jerome Noel Jumonville (December 5, 1941 – December 7, 2019), better known as Jerry Jumonville,  was an American jazz, rhythm and blues, and rock and roll saxophonist, arranger, and composer. He began playing the saxophone as teenager.

about_quotes.speaker: Plas Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: Jerry is not a student of mine but he’s been a fan of mine for years, and we talk about pieces
about_quotes.doc_title: Plas Johnson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
